---
title: "Mary Frances Younghusband"
---

## Mary Frances Younghusband

**Dates:** (1847-1899)

### Description

member of the Gosling Society

### Biography

She was a Gosling as Mignonette 1866/7-?9, her address 23 Maryon Road, Woolwich, and she was probably this person, who was daughter of Lt Gen. C. W. Younghusband (1821-1899), Superintendent of Royal Gun Factories, Woolwich.  If so, she married (1871) Lt.-Col. George O'Malley.  She was accused by C.R. Coleridge of carelessly mislaying the <i>Barnacle</i> [LG 1906 Younghusband, O'Malley].

### Letters

- [To Christabel Rose Coleridge, Aug 12 [1899]](../letters/3416_To_Christabel_Rose_Coleridge.html)
- Letter from [March 1869]
- Letter from March 6 th [1869]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
